hero.desc: Leading developer and manufacturer of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs). We provide advanced solutions in aerial monitoring, payload systems, and laser scanning.

footer.desc: Leading developer and manufacturer of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) and aerospace solutions.

t20.title: ATRAK T-20
t20.desc: A UAV with an electric motor and increased payload can be in the air for more than 7 hours at a distance of more than 100 km from the operator.
fullDesc: The ATRAK T-20 is equipped with an electric motor, thanks to which the aircraft can stay in the air for more than 7 hours, transmitting HD video at a distance of more than 100 km from the control point. The unmanned system is used for reconnaissance and surveillance of objects of interest.

The ATRAK T-20 UAV is equipped with an on-board calculator using modern artificial intelligence algorithms, which allows to quickly make the necessary decisions, increasing the efficiency of application compared to analogues of other manufacturers.

Fully compatible with the ATRAK T-16 model, the ground equipment, including the launcher and payloads, is an advantage and allows to significantly reduce the cost of retrofitting existing complexes, making it possible to start using the new UAV in the shortest possible time. The new model has an increased payload capacity, which allows the installation of additional payloads depending on the task facing the UAV operator.
benefits: On-board AI for object search and identification with priority target selection mode

tableSpecs.navigation: INS with SNS correction, double-range finder, alternative navigation system, video navigation system (VNS)

products.title: Products & Solutions
products.desc: Explore our range of industry-leading unmanned systems, payloads, and specialized aerospace equipment designed for demanding operations.

services.title: Our Services
services.desc: Comprehensive aerial solutions tailored for industrial, agricultural, and security applications.

service-1.title: Aerial Photography
service-1.desc: High-resolution orthophotomaps and 3D terrain models using advanced optical payloads for accurate mapping.

service-2.title: Laser Scanning
service-2.desc: Airborne LiDAR scanning to acquire highly precise elevation data, even through dense vegetation cover.

service-3.title: Monitoring Services
service-3.desc: Continuous remote monitoring of critical infrastructure, pipelines, and agricultural zones.
